content.title: Smart security and real savings for your property
content.subtitle: Eliminate human failure, cut costs by up to 70% and keep total control with our Remote Concierge.
content.description: Property managers already know: traditional concierge services are expensive, vulnerable and inefficient. Our solution replaces outdated operations with an intelligent 24/7 remote monitoring system powered by artificial intelligence and advanced access control.
content.caption: Limited availability for live demos
content.imageAlt: Secure condominium operated with remote concierge

pains.title: Real problems every property faces
pains.subtitle: We surface the most critical pains of the traditional concierge to show how remote operations reshape daily routines.

costs.title: Escalating costs
costs.description: Up to 60% of the monthly budget can be drained by the legacy concierge setup.

humanRisk.title: Human risk
humanRisk.description: On-site staff can be coerced or overrun in risk situations.

lackControl.title: Lack of control and transparency
lackControl.description: Without detailed records, managers are exposed during audits and disputes.

inefficiency.title: Inefficient service
inefficiency.description: Slow visitor approval and parcel handling hurt residents' experience.

comparison.subtitle: See how remote concierge delivers efficiency and savings from day one.

benefits.title: Tangible benefits for managers, boards and residents
benefits.subtitle: A complete security and experience layer that transforms the condominium from day one.

savings.title: Real savings
savings.description: Cut up to 70% of costs by replacing on-site teams with intelligent 24/7 remote operations.

zeroSurrender.title: Zero surrender
zeroSurrender.description: With no operator on site, the risk of coercion disappears while protection remains uninterrupted.

autonomy.title: Full autonomy
autonomy.description: Exclusive resident app with remote access approvals, temporary QR codes and digital credentials.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Every interaction is recorded with photo, video and audio, ready for audits and meetings.

reliability.title: 24/7 reliability
reliability.description: Continuous monitoring backed by redundant power and connectivity.

locker.title: i-Locker convenience
locker.description: Secure parcel delivery with smart lockers connected to the remote hub.

intelligence.title: Our edge is the proactive AI intelligence matrix
intelligence.subtitle: Data, sensors and proprietary AI work together to anticipate risks and trigger instant responses.

highlights.text: Detects suspicious patterns in real time.
Learns the property routine to predict risks.

differentials.subtitle: Proprietary technology, specialized teams and data-driven operations to deliver maximum protection.

technology.title: Proprietary, global-grade technology
technology.description: Advanced AI, multi-factor biometrics, facial recognition, license plate scans and dynamic QR codes.

proactiveSecurity.title: Proactive AI security
proactiveSecurity.description: We intervene before threats with predictive monitoring and immediate playbooks.

agileService.title: Agile response (78% of calls in 5s)
agileService.description: 24/7 command center with specialists responding in under five seconds.

dashboard.title: Complete dashboard
dashboard.description: KPIs, customizable reports and full audits for managers and boards.

technicalSupport.title: 24/7 technical support with 1h SLA
technicalSupport.description: Local team ready to intervene on-site with guaranteed response times.

image.alt: Monitoring team operating the remote concierge hub

items.question: What is remote concierge and how does it work?
items.answer: We replace the on-site concierge with remote monitoring using cameras, biometrics and a 24/7 command center.

items.question: Is it really safe without on-site personnel?
items.answer: Yes. We remove the risk of human coercion and keep every access fully recorded with photo, video and audio.

items.question: What happens during outages?
items.answer: We maintain redundant internet links and backup power with UPS and generators.

items.question: How do residents control access?
items.answer: Residents use our exclusive app with remote approvals via QR code, facial recognition or biometrics.

items.question: What is the immediate benefit for the property?
items.answer: Up to 70% cost savings tied to a cutting-edge, proactive security infrastructure.

content.line2: Your property can save up to 70% right now.
content.line3: Click the button below and request a free demo of our Intelligent Remote Concierge.
